data.content: Implemented the retakes view detail toggle in a dedicated worktree. Notes and handoff capsules now share one header toggle, default collapsed, while descriptions and steps remain visible. Added a source contract test covering the default-off state and shared control. Validation in /private/tmp/foolery-6df0-impl: bun run test -- src/lib/__tests__/retakes-pagination-layout.test.ts, bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build. Lint completed with pre-existing warnings only; test, typecheck, and build passed.
